alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defences Engage Iranian Missiles and UAVs
alerts.description: UAE air defenses engaged 8 Iranian ballistic missiles, 4 cruise missiles, and 36 UAVs on March 31, 2026. Cumulative statistics show 433 ballistic missiles, 19 cruise missiles, and 1977 UAVs since the start of Iranian aggression.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defences Engage 48 Iranian Projectiles
alerts.description: UAE air defences successfully engaged 8 ballistic missiles, 4 cruise missiles and 36 UAVs launched from Iran. Attack resulted in 8 fatalities and 188 injuries including 2 armed forces members and 1 civilian contractor.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Intercept Iranian Attack
alerts.description: UAE air defenses successfully intercepted 8 ballistic missiles, 4 cruise missiles, and 36 drones launched from Iran. Since the beginning of Iranian attacks, UAE has dealt with 433 ballistic missiles, 19 cruise missiles, and 1977 drones total. The attacks resulted in 2 military casualties and 188 civilian injuries ranging from minor to severe.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defences Engaging Iranian Missiles and Drones
alerts.description: UAE air defense systems are currently actively engaging ballistic missiles, cruise missiles and drones from Iran. Sounds heard across various areas of the country are from ongoing interception operations.
